description: Remove unreferenced/orphaned files from an unpacked .pptx directory: orphaned slides not in sldIdLst (and their .rels), the [trash] directory, orphaned .rels, unreferenced media/embeddings/charts/diagrams/drawings/ink/theme/notes files, and stale [Content_Types].xml overrides.
rules: requires defusedxml (vendored core imports defusedxml.minidom); degrades gracefully when absent
mutates UNPACKED_DIR in place — deletes only files unreachable from presentation.xml relationships
the list of removed files is captured to clean.txt under record_store
usage: Set UNPACKED_DIR (an unpacked .pptx dir). Output: clean.txt (list of removed files).
limitation: Operates only on an already-unpacked directory (run unpack first). Idempotent: re-running on a clean dir removes nothing.
